items.title: Innovative Solutions and Support (ISSC) Down 41.5% Since Q3 2025 Release
items.description: ​Innovative Solutions and Support, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISSC) is one of the Undervalued Aerospace Stocks to Buy Now. Innovative Solutions and Support, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISSC) released its fiscal third quarter results on August 14, and the stock has declined more than 41.5% since the announcement. ​The company reported a revenue of $24.1 million, which grew 105% year-over-year and […]
